author: Clément Vannicatte
subject: fix(SmartSort): make `textComponent` and `buttonTextComponent` optional (algolia/react-instantsearch#3014)
body:
* fix(SmartSort): make `textComponent` and `buttonTextComponent` optional, provide default `buttonTextComponent`

* upgrade bundlesize
